slides.title: Heavy? Rest *long*
slides.body: 3 to 5 minutes for big strength lifts.

slides.title: Don't *rush*
slides.body: Short rest tanks your next set.

slides.title: Recover, then *go*
slides.body: Rest until you can hit your reps again.

slides.title: Rest *right*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training dialed in.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
